prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约7175→9610→6445→8535→9114，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约9114名。近两年位次在8500–9600区间波动，2025年较2024 年后移约579名；本省物理类计划2021年49人、2022年50人、2023年52人、2024年55人、2025年56人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划58人，较2025年 再增2人，扩招幅度约3.6%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65区间，属 中上水平211；2026年声誉数据中河海大学未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第52（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度，但未出现爆款级传播；近年无投档断 档记录，报考心理平稳；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，水利类相关专业为学校王牌，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，河海大学在上述领域均有招生；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人，较2025年（物理类+历史类约 172114人）略有减少，按近年物理类占比约68%估算，2026年物理类考生约113900人，较2025年减少约3500人，竞争压力略有缓解。；河海大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在黑龙江省招生占比约0.5%–0.7%（2024年约0.6%），属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9 114名、2026年小幅扩招2人（+3.6%）、本省物理类考生总数略降、学校声誉平稳等因素，结合考生规模略降的缓和效应，预测2026年最 低位次约9359名，区间8859–9859名。扩招带来的竞争加剧与考生总数减少的缓和作用基本抵消，位次较2025年小幅后移约245名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约9359名，区间8859–9859名。位次在区间下限（8859名）以内可重点冲刺一档水利类大禹班、计算机等王牌热门专业；位次在区间中段（约9359名）建议以二档水利水 电、软件工程、通信工程等为主力，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（9859名）附近建议以三档土木、材料等保底，同时可尝试二档中位次要求较低的专业。河海水利类为全国顶 尖，就业对口率高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 7175 → 9610 → 6445 → 8535 → 9114, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a baseline of about 9114 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings fluctuated in the 8500–9600 range, and in 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 579 positions compared to 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 49 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 58, an increase of 2 more compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 3.6%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks about 63rd in 2026, with a stable ranking in the 60–65 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2026 reputation data, Hohai University showed no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms but no viral-level dissemination. In recent years, there have been no records of enrollment gaps, indicating stable application psychology. Hydraulic Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A. Water conservancy-related majors are the university's flagship programs, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Hohai University enrolls students in these fields. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, a slight decrease from about 172,114 in 2025 (Physics + History categories). Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 68%, it is estimated that there will be about 113,900 Physics Category candidates in 2026, a decrease of about 3,500 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local preference. Its enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 0.5%–0.7% (about 0.6% in 2024), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9,114, a small expansion of 2 students in 2026 (+3.6%), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in the province, and stable university reputation, combined with the mitigating effect of the slight decrease in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 9,359, with a range of 8,859–9,859. The intensified competition from expansion and the mitigating effect of the decrease in candidate numbers largely offset each other, resulting in a slight backward shift of about 245 positions compared to 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 9,359, with a range of 8,859–9,859. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (8,859) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Water Conservancy Dayu Class, Computer Science, and other flagship popular majors. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 9,359) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Water Resources and Hydropower, Software Engineering, and Communication Engineering, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (9,859) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering and Materials Science as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Hohai's Water Conservancy is top in the country with high employment matching rates, making it worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1044 → 1391 → 1143 → 1355 → 1663, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend, with a baseline of about 1663 in 2025. Over the past three years, the ranking gradually declined from 1143 to 1663, a cumulative decline of about 520 positions, indicating a clear downward trend. The provincial history category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 5 in 2025, and maintained at 5 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not further reduced, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 63rd, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, which also attracts liberal arts candidates to some extent. In 2026 reputation data, Hohai University showed no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with overall attention stable. There have been no records of admission gaps in recent years. Hohai University is known for engineering, with relatively limited advantages in liberal arts disciplines, but majors such as Law (Industry-Education Integration Excellence Class), English, and Land Resource Management still have certain competitiveness relying on the university's 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Accounting/Finance/Auditing categories are divided and wait-and-see, English/Foreign Language categories are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 32%, the estimated number of history category examinees in 2026 is about 53,100, a decrease of about 1,600 compared to 2025 (54,707), slightly easing competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a provincial university. Its history category enrollment in Heilongjiang Province is extremely small (5 students), with a very low enrollment proportion, and is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1663, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the total number of provincial history category examinees, and stable university reputation, and taking into account the easing effect of about a 3% reduction in history category examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1683, with a range of 1380–1986. The ranking is expected to slightly decline by about 20 positions compared to 2025, continuing the fluctuating downward trend of recent years.
